title: Funnel stage mapping
description: Keywords should connect to TOFU, MOFU, BOFU, or retention journeys.
do: Map keywords to TOFU, MOFU, BOFU, or retention.
Connect TOFU content to commercial pages.
Prioritize BOFU terms for faster business impact.
Include support/retention queries for SaaS and product sites.
dont: Leave informational content disconnected from money pages.
